title: eleocharis alveolata
intro: Eleocharis alveolata is a species of flowering plant in the sedge family, Cyperaceae, commonly known as a type of spike rush. Traditionally, Eleocharis alveolata has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and helping to treat respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Eleocharis alveolata is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
